zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord John Bradburne於1425年出生在英國德比夏爾阿希布恩時，他的父親Henry De Bradbourne31歲，母親Margery Baggott27歲。他於1446年7月與Anne Vernon在英國德比夏爾萊藍德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1485年在英國德比夏爾享年60歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾阿希布恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord John Bradburne于1425年出生在英国德比夏爾阿希布恩时，他的父亲Henry De Bradbourne31岁，母亲Margery Baggott27岁。他于1446年7月与Anne Vernon在英国德比夏爾萊藍德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1485年在英国德比夏爾享年60岁，埋葬在英国德比夏爾阿希布恩。

nameMeanings.name: Bradburne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bradburn
meanings: English: habitational name from Bradbourne in Derbyshire or occasionally from Brabourne in Kent, both named with Old English brād ‘broad’ + burna ‘stream’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord John Bradburne was born in 1425, in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, his father, Henry De Bradbourne, was 31 and his mother, Margery Baggott, was 27. He married Anne Vernon in July 1446, in Hulland, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. He died in 1485, in Derbyshire, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord John Bradburne est né en 1425, à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry De Bradbourne, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margery Baggott, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Anne Vernon en juillet 1446, à Hulland, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en 1485, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord John Bradburne 1425 in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry De Bradbourne 31 und seine Mutter Margery Baggott 27. Er hat im Juli 1446 in Hulland, Derbyshire, England Anne Vernon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1485 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Derbyshire, England und wurde in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John Bradburne è nato il nel 1425 nel Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Henry De Bradbourne, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Margery Baggott, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Anne Vernon nel luglio 1446, nel Hulland, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1485, nel Derbyshire, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord John Bradburneが1425年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルンで生まれた時，父Henry De Bradbourneは31歳，母Margery Baggottは27歳であった。1446年7月にイギリスデルブイシュアイアハランドでAnne Vernonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1485年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで60歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord John Bradburne(이)가 1425년 영국 더비실르 애쉬보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry De Bradbourne(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Baggott(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1446년 7월 영국 더비실르 훌랜드에서 Anne Vernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1485년 영국 더비실르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 애쉬보우른에 묻혔다.

mn.Syston, Leicestershire, England: Syston, Ratae Coritanorum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John Bradburne nasceu em 1425, em Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry De Bradbourne, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margery Baggott, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Vernon em julho de 1446, em Hulland, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1485, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord John Bradburne родился в 1425 г. в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry De Bradbourne было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margery Baggott, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Vernon июль 1446 г. в местности хулланд, дирбишир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1485 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord John Bradburne nació en 1425, en Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry De Bradbourne, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margery Baggott, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Anne Vernon en julio de 1446, en Hulland, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. Murió en 1485, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
